title: (Bullish Signal) ADSK, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling ADSK's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 47 similar cases where ADSK's MACD histogram became positive, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 79%. Current price $295.23 crossed the support line at $284.83 and is trading between $302.13 support and $284.83 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/24/21 - 04/26/21, the price experienced a +14% Uptrend. During the week of 04/19/21 - 04/26/21, the stock enjoyed a +3% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/7cxptupalqv61.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=e94c2d2e8b738ea56124f57b7f3b3e24b11d92c3

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detecetd that in 43 of 55 cases where ADSK's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ADSK just turned positive on April 26, 2021. Looking at past instances where ADSK's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 37 of 47 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

ADSK moved above its 50-day Moving Average on April 01, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for ADSK crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on April 12, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detecetd that in 12 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

Following a +3.94% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ADSK advanced for three days, in 263 of 344 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detecetd that in 237 of 351 cases where ADSK Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 68%.
